repos.name: hyprstate
repos.blurb: Session state machine — lid events, monitor profiles, lock, suspend, USB wake. Built b/c laptop docking on Wayland is a lie

repos.name: hyprland-voice-dictation
repos.blurb: Offline push-to-talk dictation (Parakeet ASR, all local) that types into any focused window

repos.name: hyprnotice
repos.blurb: Notification daemon with an inbox that keeps the action buttons alive after the popup's gone

repos.name: sni-watcher
repos.blurb: Standalone tray watcher so icons survive bar restarts (looking at you, Electron)

repos.name: waybar-workspace-buttons
repos.blurb: Event-driven workspace buttons for Waybar — no polling, no shelling out

repos.name: linux-multi-theme-toggle
repos.blurb: Whole-desktop light/dark switching with Material You colors, fast enough that you don't watch it happen

repos.name: deck-tenant
repos.blurb: Per-Steam-account homes for non-Steam apps on a shared Steam Deck. No more reading my Discord messages

repos.name: couchcord
repos.blurb: Controller-driven Discord voice control + overlay for gamescope sessions — join, leave, see who's talking, without alt-tabbing out of the game

repos.name: greetd_game_mode
repos.blurb: Hit the Guide button at the login screen, get Big Picture

repos.name: steam-notes
repos.blurb: Field notes from digging around Steam client internals so you don't have to

repos.name: arch-repo
repos.blurb: Self-hosted pacman repo served from GitHub Pages — where the tools above ship from

repos.name: packaging-workflows
repos.blurb: Reusable GH Actions for Arch + COPR packaging

repos.name: greetd-config
repos.blurb: greetd + regreet login manager setup — multi-distro, symlink installer, optional game mode

repos.name: dotfiles
repos.blurb: Holding all of the above together
